subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 13/26] server41tests: add a test for directory add notifications

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test to the server41tests suite, specifically designed to verify that the NFSv4.1 server sends correct directory delegation notifications when a file is added to a delegated directory. The test involves requesting a dir delegation with ADD_ENTRY notifications, creating a file from a second client, and verifying that the server sends a CB_NOTIFY with the correct ADD event details.
